title: One Piece World Like - Mine Piece
description: Transforms Minecraft into a true One Piece-inspired world with custom oceans, islands, conquest systems, and Grand Line exploration for the Mine Piece mod.
body:
☠️ One Piece World Like — Mine Piece Version
Transform your Minecraft world into a true One Piece adventure inspired by the Mine Piece mod universe.

Explore a completely redesigned world with separated oceans, dangerous seas, conquerable islands, crews, wars, progression systems and exploration mechanics made to recreate the feeling of sailing through the Grand Line.

🌍 World Features
Custom One Piece inspired world generation

The 4 Blues separated by the Red Line and Calm Belts

Reverse Mountain at spawn connecting the seas

Grand Line progression system

Massive ocean exploration

New islands spread across the world

Dangerous sea routes and isolated regions

🏴‍☠️ Island System
Players can live and conquer islands

Loyalty system based on activity and survival

Become the ruler of an island

Protect territories, bases and resources

Rival crews can invade and take control

Island bonuses and progression rewards

⚔️ Adventure & Progression
Crew and faction gameplay

PvP wars and territorial conflicts

Haki and Doriki progression

Exploration-focused survival

End-game islands and dangerous areas

Special access progression for Nether and End regions

🌊 Immersive One Piece Experience
Sail between islands like a real pirate

Build kingdoms and hidden bases

Explore oceans filled with secrets

Travel through the Grand Line

Fight for territory dominance

Create your own pirate story

🔥 Designed For
Multiplayer SMP servers

Crew roleplay

Exploration and adventure

PvP and conquest gameplay

Long-term survival progression

Embark on your journey and conquer the seas.
